parlays.label: Elite Scorers Sweep
parlays.rationale: Three elite volume scorers, all 10/10 hit rates, facing mid-to-soft defenses across independent games.

parlays.label: Hornets Volume Stack
parlays.rationale: Miller and Knueppel co-exist as CHA's top scoring options; volume_game tag reinforces both hitting low thresholds.

parlays.label: Giannis Boards Builder
parlays.rationale: Giannis REB prop diversifies from pure scoring; soft ATL defense and upward rebounding trend support all legs.

parlays.label: CHA-BOS Feeder Play
parlays.rationale: LaMelo feeds Miller in CHA's offensive system; feeder_target tag confirms positive correlation between these two legs.

parlays.label: Wednesday Prop Sweeper

parlays.label: Thursday Volume Sweep

parlays.rationale: Ingram feeding Barrett is a genuine same-game positive correlation; Randle assists and Jokic scoring add independent elite-conf legs.

parlays.label: Booker-Bane-Randle Trio
parlays.rationale: Three independent soft-to-mid matchups across different games; all legs sit at 85–90% confidence with strong recent hit rates.

parlays.label: Scorers Across the Slate
parlays.rationale: Four volume-game scorers across four independent games; spread reduces single-game variance with all legs backed by 8–10/10 hit rates.

parlays.label: Doncic-Bane-Randle Edge
parlays.rationale: Doncic and Bane rebound props pair with Randle-Barrett positive TOR-MIN correlation; Booker's trending 3PM adds a clean independent anchor.

parlays.label: Elite Scorers Sweep
parlays.rationale: Three elite scorers across independent games, all with 9-10/10 hit rates and stable trends.

parlays.label: Friday Iron Floor

parlays.rationale: Miller and Kawhi iron-floor anchors combined with Jokic volume and Reaves' sub-T2 3PM across four independent games.

parlays.label: Murray-Brown Trend Ride
parlays.rationale: Two iron-floor anchors plus Murray upward-trending 3PM and Brown's conservative AST floor across four games.

parlays.label: Kawhi-Jokic-Doncic Trio
parlays.rationale: Three-leg tighter parlay: two elite volume scorers plus Doncic's conservative rebound floor vs soft IND.

parlays.label: Volume Scorers Sweep

parlays.rationale: Three separate games, three different prop types; Kawhi's soft MEM matchup and Maxey's 9/10 iron-floor 3PM diversify risk cleanly.

parlays.label: SGA-Banchero-Edwards Triple

parlays.label: Kawhi-SGA-Randle Boards
parlays.rationale: Three independent games; Kawhi and Randle both trending up on conservative REB floors, SGA AST adds cross-game diversity.

parlays.label: Banchero-Bane-Cunningham Mix
parlays.rationale: Banchero and Bane operate non-competitively in ORL's offense; Cunningham exploits BKN's soft defense for a safe 15-point floor.

parlays.label: Miller-Barrett Iron Floor
parlays.rationale: Three iron-floor scorers across independent games; all trending up or stable with 9/10 or 8/10 hit rates.

parlays.rationale: LeBron AST feeder prop (non-PTS) anchors two independent iron-floor scorers across four separate teams.

parlays.rationale: Reaves low-threshold 3PM iron floor diversifies prop types; Barrett and Miller provide independent volume-game scoring floors.

parlays.label: Durant-Booker Cross-Slate Edge
parlays.rationale: Four different games, three distinct prop types (AST, PTS, 3PM); no competing roles, maximum game-script independence across slate.

parlays.label: Miller AST-Durant-White Diversifier
parlays.rationale: Miller AST (not PTS) exposes him via different prop type; paired with Durant PTS and White PTS across fully independent games.

parlays.label: Kawhi-SGA Feeder Stack
parlays.rationale: SGA feeding Holmgren in a volume OKC-DEN game creates feeder-target correlation, anchored by Kawhi's 10/10 floor.

parlays.label: Mobley-Murray Floor Lock
parlays.rationale: Three different prop types across three independent games minimize shared game-script bust risk while maintaining 78%+ floor.

parlays.rationale: Cross-game big-man props with different stat types; Mobley REB and Embiid AST operate independently across different games.

parlays.rationale: Three independent games, all 9/10 hit rates, no shared lineup risk, conservative thresholds across different prop types.

parlays.rationale: Three separate games, volume_game correlation tags, all 9/10 hit rates with ultra-low conservative thresholds minimizing bust risk.
